subcodes.first_line: Most mighty and noble ambassador, most great minister, may your prosperity continue, I wish to say that your letter has arrived
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود خدمت سفیر اعظم اکرم و وزیر افخم دام اقباله العالی آنکه مکتوب حضرت عالی رسید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @petitions to authorities, @thankfulness; gratitude
